author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Trackmania Summer 2026
Summer is here! ☀️

Dive into the new seasonal campaign and take on 5 new Black Tracks for a journey through Argentina, Saudi Arabia, Poland, Norway, and Japan!

✨ Unlock new Prestige Skins.

Don't miss a summer packed with the Esports World Cup taking place on August 19-22 and RPG community events!

Read more 👉 https://www.trackmania.com/news/9225

ABOUT TRACKMANIA
Welcome to Trackmania — the unique racing game that combines precision and creativity. 

Trackmania® offers a unique, easy-to-learn, hard-to-master gameplay experience with a wide diversity of tracks across five stunning environment (Red Island, Blue Bay, Green Coast, White Shore, and Stadium) along with regular content updates and live events:
- Face new racing challenges with Weekly Shorts and Weekly Grands, a new season every three months, and more player-made tracks featured in the “Track of the Day” selection.
- Compete online in Daily and Weekly Cups, Grand Enduro races, as well as in community-driven and worldwide esports events.

About Ubisoft: 
Ubisoft is a creator of worlds, committed to enriching players’ lives with original and memorable entertainment experiences. Ubisoft’s global teams create and develop a deep and diverse portfolio of games, featuring brands such as Assassin’s Creed®, Brawlhalla®, For Honor®, Far Cry®, Tom Clancy’s Ghost Recon®, Just Dance®, Rabbids®, Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six®, The Crew®, Tom Clancy’s The Division®, and Watch Dogs®. Through Ubisoft Connect, players can enjoy an ecosystem of services to enhance their gaming experience, get rewards and connect with friends across platforms. With Ubisoft+, the subscription service, they can access a growing catalog of more than 100 Ubisoft games and DLC. For the 2021–22 fiscal year, Ubisoft generated net bookings of €2,129 million. To learn more, please visit: www.ubisoftgroup.com.
